question: Will anyone get a perfect score at ARML 2026?
reason: Historical data shows few perfect scores in ARML Individual Rounds.
evidence: In 2025, Christopher Qiu achieved a perfect score in the Individual Round.
In 2024, a New Hampshire student scored 9 out of 10 in the Individual Round.
In 2023, a Central Jersey student scored a perfect 10 in the Individual Round.
In 2021, Srinivas Arun achieved one of only six perfect scores in the Individual Round.
In 2020, a Colorado student placed 12th in the Individual Round.
In 2019, a Colorado student placed 5th in the Individual Round.
searchQueries: ARML 2026 perfect score likelihood individual round
